---
title: "Utah Housing Affordability Analysis - STAT 386"
---

This is a project website by Sujin Leek and Matthew Conger recording our work with US Census Data regarding Utah housing. We were curious as to what specific factors were affecting the decrease in affordability and availability of single-family homes in Utah.

A streamlit app for seeing exploratory data analysis and plots can be found [here: ](https://stat386utahhousingproject.streamlit.app/)

A link to the Github Repository for the Python package used to complete this analysis [here: ](https://github.com/Congerm/Utah_Housing_Project) 

This website includes a technical report, documentation, and a tutorial. Navigate using the tabs above. 






This is a Quarto website. To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
